exercises.prompt: Convert: 3 km to m, 5000 mm to m, 2 hours to minutes. Write each with the conversion factor.
exercises.solution: 3 km = 3 × 1000 m = 3000 m. 5000 mm = 5000 × 0.001 m = 5 m. 2 hours = 2 × 60 = 120 minutes. Use conversion fractions: multiply by (new unit/old unit).
hints: Write as fractions to cancel units

exercises.prompt: Convert 90 km/h to m/s. (Hint: need to convert both km and h)
exercises.solution: 3 km = 3 × 1000 m = 3000 m. 5000 mm = 5000 × 0.001 m = 5 m. 2 hours = 2 × 60 = 120 minutes. Use conversion fractions: multiply by (new unit/old unit).
